nasb.text: And He said to them, “Why are you troubled, and why do doubts arise in your hearts?

esv.text: And he said to them, “Why are you troubled, and why do doubts arise in your hearts?

cnv.text: 他說：“你們為甚麼驚慌，為甚麼心裡疑惑呢？

ccb.text: 耶稣说：“你们为什么忧心忡忡？为什么心存疑惑呢？

csbs.text: 耶稣对他们说：“你们为什么惊慌不安？为什么心里起疑惑呢？
